overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a bustling cyberpunk market bazaar from the game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit stalls, diverse NPCs, industrial metal architecture with natural light filtering through gaps, and various vendors selling food and electronics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market corridor with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market corridor, observing the food stalls and vendors

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow jacket standing at food counter, gesturing with her hands
large man in orange coat standing with arms crossed, observing the market

entered.detail: food stall with red and white striped facade serving noodles
industrial metal support pillars holding up the market roof structure
glowing orange neon light fixtures hanging from the ceiling
angled glass panels in the metal roof allowing natural light to filter through

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk market corridor with industrial metal architecture. A striped food counter sits prominently in the center while a woman in yellow interacts with the vendor. Metal support beams and orange neon tubes define the space as the camera moves past a large man in an orange coat standing near an electronics workbench.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with electronics repair stalls

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market, passing by a woman leaning against the wall and approaching a computer repair area

notable_agents.action: woman with blue hair leaning against metal scaffolding with arms crossed
man sitting at workbench repairing electronic equipment

entered.detail: pile of blue plastic trash bags stacked against the wall
circular pink neon sign glowing on the right wall
bar counter with holographic displays and computer equipment
multiple CRT monitors displaying green text and data

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market, the camera passes a blue-haired woman leaning against scaffolding near blue trash bags. The scene shifts to reveal a computer repair area with holographic bar counters and CRT monitors. The metal support beams recede into the background as the electronics stall becomes the focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: market section with vending machines and holographic bar

agents.ego_description: walking past a food cart emitting steam and approaching a bar with holographic interface

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the holographic bar counter, leaning on the surface

entered.detail: food cart emitting steam with glowing orange neon lights
three white plastic mannequins standing against the wall
blue vending machine with yellow signage displaying snacks
bar counter with blue holographic interface displays showing diamond symbols
brass musical instrument on display stand near the bar

segments.scene_description: The market corridor continues past a steaming food cart with orange neon lights. White mannequins stand against the right wall near blue vending machines. The camera approaches a high-tech bar featuring holographic displays and a brass trumpet decoration, where a vendor stands behind the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial market corridor with exposed ceiling infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal industrial ceiling pipes and ductwork before returning to eye level

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the industrial ceiling architecture, then continuing forward through the market

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal pipes running along the industrial ceiling
rectangular metal ventilation ducts attached to the ceiling
food stall with green painted walls and metal fence windows

segments.scene_description: The camera briefly tilts upward to showcase the industrial ceiling infrastructure with large metal pipes and ductwork against bright skylights. Returning to eye level, the scene reveals a green-walled food stall with metal fencing as the camera continues through the bustling market corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: market plaza with burrito stand and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the final market section past outdoor seating and food stalls

notable_agents.action: person sitting on red plastic chair outside the burrito stand

entered.detail: red neon sign reading BURRITOS on the green building facade
teal green painted building wall with metal grate windows
bright red plastic chairs arranged outside the food stall
tables and chairs set up for outdoor dining in the market

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a more open market plaza with a prominent burrito stand marked by red neon signage on a green building facade. Red plastic chairs and outdoor seating areas line the path as the camera moves past vendors and market patrons. The industrial ceiling gives way to a more open roof structure with natural light streaming in.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, industrial cyberpunk corridor that gradually opens into a bright, airy market plaza. It begins amidst heavy metal support beams and orange neon tubes, gliding past a striped food counter and an electronics workbench. As the camera moves deeper into the market, the industrial architecture recedes to make room for holographic computer repair stations and steaming food carts lined with white mannequins and blue vending machines. The perspective briefly tilts upward to reveal a complex ceiling of pipes and ductwork against bright skylights before returning to eye level to pass a green-walled stall. Finally, the enclosed corridor expands into an open plaza where natural light streams through the roof, illuminating a burrito stand with red neon signage and outdoor seating areas.
